generated_pair.question: What is the purpose of using HTMLRewriter in the 'Single Page App (SPA) shell with bootstrap data' example?
generated_pair.answer: HTMLRewriter is used to inject prefetched bootstrap data into an SPA shell, eliminating client-side data fetching on initial load.
supporting_sentences:
Single Page App (SPA) shell with bootstrap data
Use HTMLRewriter to inject prefetched bootstrap data into an SPA shell, eliminating client-side data fetching on initial load. Works with Workers Static Assets or an externally hosted SPA.
